title: VJ & Social Media Executive
desc: Act as the primary point of coordination for client requirements, managing content calendars and ensuring timely delivery of video assets aligned with platform-specific posting schedules.
Plan and assign video editing workflows by coordinating with editors, tracking production progress, and ensuring deliverables meet both creative standards and client deadlines.
Develop engaging, platform-optimized captions and video descriptions that reflect brand voice, improve reach, and support audience engagement goals.
Manage end-to-end publishing by scheduling and posting video content across social media platforms, ensuring consistency, accuracy, and adherence to campaign timelines.

title: VJ & Content Writer
desc: Hosted events and interviews with diverse audience engagement.
Created emotionally engaging and informative scripts on trending topics.
Wrote for YouTube videos, reels, and Instagram posts with audience focus.
Maintained tone and timing in line with show format.
Collaborated with editors to align voice and visuals.
